name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late orders. We automate payment schedules instead of manual tracking.
features: Send reminders to accounts payable teams
Provide a simple dashboard for tracking payments
